zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Phillips是Sir John Philips的女兒，於1425年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾斯特盧德。她於1395年與Sir Richard Cecil結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1455年在英國格盧斯特斯爾布利享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: Phillips
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, North German, and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name   Philip  . In North America, this surname has also absorbed cognates from other languages (see   Philips  ).

variants.name: Phillipps
meanings: English, Scottish and Dutch: variant of   Phillips  .

variants.name: Philipps
meanings: English, Scottish, North German, and Dutch: variant of   Phillips  .

variants.name: Philip
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Varughese, Mathai, Babu, Reji, Anil, Binu, Neena, Prema, Raju, Reena, Susheela, Aleykutty.

Scottish, English, German, Dutch, and Jewish: from the Greek personal name Philippos (from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’). In the New Testament this name is borne by one of the apostles; it was also borne by various other early Christian saints. It owes part of its popularity to the medieval romances about Alexander the Great, whose father was Philip of Macedon. As a Jewish name, it represents a borrowing of the personal name from Christians. As a Highland Scottish surname, it represents an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhilib ‘son of Philip’. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Spanish Felipe , Catalan Felip, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian or Croatian Filip , Albanian Filipi , and their derivatives (see examples at Philips ). The name Philip is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Philipose and Pothen ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Phillip .
French (southern) and Breton (Finistère): variant of   Philippe  .

variants.name: Phelps
meanings: Scottish and English (southwestern): variant of   Phillips  .

History: The brothers George and William Phelps emigrated from Gloucestershire, England, to Dorchester, MA, c. 1630. Five years later they moved to Windsor, CT. George's sixth-generation descendant, Anson Greene Phelps (1781–1853), rose from being a penniless orphan to the status of a major industrialist and a prominent CT philanthropist.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta

The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Phillips was born in 1425, in Stroud, Gloucestershire, England as the daughter of Sir John Philips. She married Sir Richard Cecil in 1395. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1455, in Burleigh, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Phillips est née en 1425, à Stroud, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, fille de Sir John Philips. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Cecil en 1395. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1455, à Burleigh, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Phillips wurde 1425 in Stroud, Gloucestershire, England, als Tochter von Sir John Philips geboren. Sie hat 1395 Sir Richard Cecil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1455 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Burleigh, Gloucestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Phillips è nata il nel 1425 nel Stroud, Gloucestershire, England come figlia di Sir John Philips. Lei sposato Sir Richard Cecil nel 1395. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1455, nel Burleigh, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Phillipsは1425年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアストロウドでSir John Philipsの娘として生まれた。1395年にSir Richard Cecilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1455年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブルレイグで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Phillips(은)는 1425년 영국 그루스스터실르 스트루드에서 Sir John Philips의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1395년 Sir Richard Cecil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1455년 영국 그루스스터실르 버리에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Phillips nasceu em 1425, em Stroud, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra filha de Sir John Philips. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Cecil em 1395. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1455, em Burleigh, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Phillips родилась в 1425 г. в местности строуд, глоусестиршир, Англия. Её отца звали Sir John Philips. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Cecil в 1395 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1455 г. в местности бурлиг, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret Phillips nació en 1425, en Stroud, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra como hija de Sir John Philips. Se casó con Sir Richard Cecil en 1395. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1455, en Burleigh, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
